allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(p.get\('typesVersions', 'no typesVersions'\), p.get\('types', 'no types'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('typesVersions:', p.get\('typesVersions','none'\)\); print\('types:', p.get\('types','none'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ex=p.get\('exports',{}\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in list\(ex.items\(\)\)[:5]}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('nostr-tools'\).then\(m => console.log\(typeof m.SimplePool.prototype.querySync, typeof m.SimplePool.prototype.publish, typeof m.SimplePool.prototype.close\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('types:', p.get\('types'\)\); print\('exports:', json.dumps\(p.get\('exports',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('nostr-tools'\).then\(m => { const p = new m.SimplePool\(\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\); let methods = []; let obj = proto; while\(obj\) { methods.push\(...Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(obj\)\); obj = Object.getPrototypeOf\(obj\); } console.log\([...new Set\(methods\)].filter\(m=>m!=='constructor'\)\) }\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('types:', p.get\('types'\)\); ex = p.get\('exports',{}\); print\(list\(ex.keys\(\)\)[:10]\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('@noble/curves/ed25519.js'\).then\(m => { console.log\('x25519 utils:', Object.keys\(m.x25519.utils\)\); console.log\('x25519 methods:', Object.keys\(m.x25519\).filter\(k => k !== 'utils'\)\) }\)")
